title.en: Therefore, Ye Tian's cultivation improved very ...

content.en:
With the help of immeasurable fire liquid and many resources, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was incomparably faster, even many times faster than when he was cultivating in the Sea of Dazzling Light.

After all, no matter how advanced the energy of the Sea of Dazzling Light is, it is far inferior to the resource of Infinite Fire Liquid!

Therefore, Ye Tian's cultivation improved very quickly.

At this rate, it won't be too long before his cultivation can break through to the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had already practiced for hundreds of billions of years.

At this time, he was already approaching the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and he was using a large amount of immeasurable fire liquid to impact the realm of the late stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

Rumble!!!

The shackles of the bottleneck were broken, and Ye Tian's cultivation stepped into the realm of the late stage of the Eightfold Ancestor.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Now, he clearly felt that his strength had skyrocketed, much stronger than before.

Moreover, with the improvement of cultivation, the life level has increased a little, and the immeasurable will has also increased a little, resulting in the power of the immeasurable dao domain increasing by a bit.

As a result, his overall strength skyrocketed!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian changed all the copied bodies, and his cultivation entered the late stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and he also copied a fire snake comparable to the late stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor.

In this way, the strength is slightly stronger, and it is more convenient to explore the flame area that cuts off the forbidden area.

Anyway, Ye Tian has gained a lot, and the resources on his body have accumulated more and more.

......

Cut off restricted areas, areas of flames.

Above a red-golden flame area, three giant mountain-like creatures gathered here.

Soon, their body shape changed, turning into three stone figures, and the aura on their bodies was extremely terrifying.

If Shadowstone is still alive and here, he will be able to recognize two of them as the mysterious creatures who hunted him down in the first place.

These three creatures are the three supreme fortifier-level creatures in this flame region, and their names are called Akagi, Golden Mountain, and Blood Desolation.

Soon, Akagi spoke: "Jinshan, blood famine, there are more and more passages between the forbidden area and the outside world, and the time and space barriers are getting weaker and weaker, and the days for us to get out of trouble are about to be longer!!"

"Yes, it's also faster than those people in the outside world, affecting the severing of the seal of Montenegro, otherwise, we can't promote this change. It's a pity that it's still a little difficult to loosen the seal and let me leave for a while!"

"We have a total of thirty-eight people in the forbidden area to strengthen the level, if we rush out, even in the outside world, no force will dare to provoke us!"

"Blood Famine, you've got in touch with one of the top tribes of the Primordial Antiquities, what's the plan?"

At this time, the blood famine said: "In contact, that top tribe also helped us break the seal, but only if we need to pay a certain amount of compensation!"

"Two Eternal Flints, one first, and one when the plan is complete!" Akagi said.

"There was a small bug that broke into us before, and the other party seemed to have an eternal flint on his body, but unfortunately at that time, the power of the seal was at its strongest, and we couldn't really come down and let him escape. Otherwise, it wouldn't be bad to kill the other party and get one more eternal flint. "

"After all, that guy fled into the Soul Splitting Red Light Area, which is the territory of the Soul Elder, although the Soul Elder is currently sealed in the depths of the Truncated Source Sea, we can't break into his territory. "

"The Eternal Flint is useless to us, if we lose it, we will lose it, and we still have to ensure that the plan is completed!"

At this moment, deep in the flame area of the Forbidden Zone, space-time cracked, and another crack appeared.

And there are already dense cracks here, and every once in a while such a crack appears.

Seeing this new rift, Akagi's heart was full of anticipation: "It won't be long before this place will be completely shattered, maybe it will be connected to the Silent Black Sea, or it may be connected to the Primordial Ancient Sea!"

......

Primordial Ancient Sea.

The Nine-Winged Tribe.

This is one of the Primordial Ancient Tribes, and it is also a top big tribe, even more powerful than the Underworld Tribe, ranking among the top three tribes of the Primordial Ancient Sea.

The Nine-Winged Tribe has five existences at the level of reinforcement, and its strength is extremely terrifying.

No one thought that the Nine-Winged Tribe had already been connected to the Blood Famine in the Flame Region of the Truncated Sector in a special way.

this day.

The five Supreme Strengtheners of the Nine-Winged Tribe are in a meeting.

"Do you really want to help cut off the penalty area and break the seal?"

"Naturally, we want to help them break the seal, after all, they have issued a reward of two Eternal Flint Stones, if we are lucky, it is enough for us to give birth to two Supreme Strengtheners!"

"But once they break the seal, maybe something will happen! Truncated Black Mountain is very mysterious, according to ancient information, before the cultivators have completely risen, Truncated Black Mountain appeared. At that time, our Primordial Antiquities had not risen, and the Primordial Ancient Sea was still the era when the Primordial Divine Beasts were in power. The entire truncated black mountain is a seal, and the reason for the scarcity of creatures in the truncated forbidden area is also because of the seal, once the seal is partially broken, the number of creatures in the truncated forbidden area will be born a lot. When the time comes, I'm afraid it will bring some trouble to our Primordial Ancient Sea!"

"Trouble is trouble, as long as our Nine Winged Tribe's Supreme Enhancement Levels are more and more, we don't have to be afraid to cut off the forbidden area. And there are really a lot of good things to cut off the forbidden area, just a small treasure land that cuts off the forbidden area, and the number of living beings is also very rare, and it has cultivated so many supreme enhancement levels. If the seal is broken, then the suppression of us outsiders by cutting off the forbidden zone will also dissipate a lot. When the time comes, they can come out, and we can also enter to find resources, which is not necessarily a bad thing!"

"Then do it!"

After a period of time, the Nine-Winged Tribe sent a top-level Avatar-level Clansman into the Flame Zone of the Forbidden Zone, bringing back an Eternal Flint from the Flame Zone.

Subsequently.

The Nine-Winged Tribe began to capture the primordial antiquities on a large scale, exterminating several small tribes, grabbing a total of hundreds of millions of primordial antiquities and more than a dozen incarnate-level primordial antiquities, preparing to sacrifice them, and then using the large array to cooperate with the truncation of the supreme reinforcement level inside the forbidden area, thereby breaking through the space-time barriers of an area, thus causing the collapse of the entire seal for a period of time.

In this way, the Cut Off Forbidden Zone and the Nine-Winged Tribe are ready.

this day.

They began to officially carry out this plan, and the top powers of the Silent Black Sea, as well as the other tribes of the Primordial Antiquities, were unaware of it.

And Ye Tian, who was at the junction of the Soul Splitting Red Light and the Flame Region, didn't know about it.
